channel.title: Node.js on Aayush
channel.description: Recent content in Node.js on Aayush

item.title: From httrack to Gemma: rebuilding a SaaS bill generator I could actually own
item.description: I tried to mirror a friend’s Next.js bill-generator site for offline use, hit the wall of client-rendered SPAs, and ended up building my own dependency-free billing app — then wired in Gemma so a photo of a paper receipt auto-fills the form.
